input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.5
            TITLE: insulation - the gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.5: Insulation - The gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources
T.6.1.5 Insulation - The gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources

final_answer: Insulation - The gas cylinder/tank must be insulated from any heat sources
